RUNIC_DOME.title: Runic Dome
RUNIC_DOME.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of your turn. You can no longer see enemy [gold]intents[/gold].
FUSION_HAMMER.title: Fusion Hammer
FUSION_HAMMER.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of your turn. You can no longer [gold]Smith[/gold] at Rest Sites.
FUSION_HAMMER.flavor: Once wielded, the owner can never let go.
COFFEE_DRIPPER.title: Coffee Dripper
COFFEE_DRIPPER.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of your turn. You can no longer [gold]Rest[/gold] at Rest Sites.
COFFEE_DRIPPER.flavor: "Yes, another cup please. Back to work. Back to work!" - The Architect
CURSED_KEY.title: Cursed Key
CURSED_KEY.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of your turn. Everytime you open a chest, obtain a unique [red]Curse[/red].
CURSED_KEY.flavor: You can feel the malicious energy emanating from the key. Power comes at a price.
HOVERING_KITE.title: Hovering Kite
HOVERING_KITE.description: The first time you discard a card each turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
HOVERING_KITE.flavor: The Kite floats around you in battle, propelled by a mysterious force.
NUCLEAR_BATTERY.title: 核能电池
NUCLEAR_BATTERY.description: At the start of each combat, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]{Plasma}[/blue] [gold]Plasma[/gold].
